# defectdojo_risk_acceptance (Data Source)

Data source for DefectDojo Risk Acceptance

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "defectdojo_risk_acceptance" "example" {
  id = "1"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) Identifier

### Read-Only

- `accepted_by` (String) The person that accepts the risk.
- `accepted_findings` (Set of Number) IDs of findings included in this risk acceptance.
- `decision` (String) Risk treatment decision.
- `decision_details` (String) Details about the risk treatment decision.
- `expiration_date` (String) When the risk acceptance expires.
- `name` (String) Descriptive name for the risk acceptance.
- `owner` (Number) User ID of the owner of this risk acceptance.
- `reactivate_expired` (Boolean) Reactivate findings when risk acceptance expires.
- `recommendation` (String) Security team recommendation.
- `recommendation_details` (String) Details explaining the security recommendation.
- `restart_sla_expired` (Boolean) Restart SLA for findings when risk acceptance expires.
